name: go-whatsapp-web-multidevice
desc: GOWA - WhatsApp REST API with support for UI, Multi Account, Webhooks, and MCP, and Chatwoot. Built with Golang for efficient memory use.
descFull: GOWA - WhatsApp REST API with support for UI, Multi Account, Webhooks, and MCP, and Chatwoot. Built with Golang for efficient memory use.
